essential.text: assert ValidChoice(y, b, r, m, m + 1, m + 2);
assert forall q | 0 <= q < |old_result| :: result[q] == old_result[q];
assert Feasible(a, b, c, rem, c2);
assert CandiesAfterDivision(b, c, a, s) == maxCandies;
assert CandiesAfterDivision(a, c, b, s) == maxCandies;
assert CandiesAfterDivision(a, b, c, s) == maxCandies;
assert ValidAssignment(pens, pencils, a, b, c, d, k);
assert SwapCost(a, b, la, lb) == da + db;
assert SwapCost(a, b, lb, la) == da + db;
assert ValidDistribution(a, b, c, n, des - a, des - b, des - c);
assert IsMinimalBoundingBox(grid, result, top, bottom, left, right); // Essential
assert IsValidSolution(x, y, z, a, b, c);
